FlavourText.original:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
FlavourText.zh_cn:
“无愧于心者，
 何惧之有？”
——瓦尔女王阿兹里
FlavourText.zh_tw:
「當你無所隱瞞，
你便無所畏懼。」
——瓦爾女王阿茲里

group.original: {0} to Level of all [Corrupted|Corrupted] Skill Gems

translation.zh_cn: 所有[Corrupted|腐化]技能宝石等级提高 {0}

group.original: Only [Soul Cores|Soul Cores] can be Socketed in this item

translation.zh_cn: 该物品仅能镶嵌[Soul Cores|灵核]
translation.zh_tw: 此物品僅可鑲嵌[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]

translation.zh_cn: 穿戴对人物[Attribute|属性]无需求

group.original: Skills from [Corrupted|Corrupted] Gems have {0}% of Mana Costs [Converted|Converted] to Life Costs

translation.zh_cn: [Corrupted|腐化]宝石的技能将魔力消耗的 {0}% [Converted|转化]为生命消耗
translation.zh_tw: 來自[Corrupted|腐化]寶石的技能的 {0}% 魔力消耗[Converted|轉換]為生命消耗

group.original: This item gains bonuses from Socketed [Soul Cores|Soul Cores] as though it was also a Helmet

translation.zh_cn: 该物品如同头部装备一样从镶嵌的[Soul Cores|灵核]中获得加成
translation.zh_tw: 此物品同時獲得鑲嵌的[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]鑲嵌於頭盔的效果

group.original: {0}% increased effect of Socketed [Soul Cores|Soul Cores]

translation.zh_cn: 镶嵌的[Soul Cores|灵核]效果提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 插槽中的[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]效果

group.original: This item gains bonuses from Socketed [Soul Cores|Soul Cores] as though it was also Gloves

translation.zh_cn: 该物品如同手部装备一样从镶嵌的[Soul Cores|灵核]中获得加成
translation.zh_tw: 此物品同時獲得鑲嵌的[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]鑲嵌於手套的效果

group.original: This item gains bonuses from Socketed [Soul Cores|Soul Cores] as though it was also Boots

translation.zh_cn: 该物品如同脚部装备一样从镶嵌的[Soul Cores|灵核]中获得加成
translation.zh_tw: 此物品同時獲得鑲嵌的[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]鑲嵌於鞋子的效果

group.original: This item gains bonuses from Socketed [Soul Cores|Soul Cores] as though it was also a Shield

translation.zh_cn: 该物品如同盾牌一样从镶嵌的[Soul Cores|灵核]中获得加成
translation.zh_tw: 此物品同時獲得鑲嵌的[Soul Cores|靈魂核心]鑲嵌於盾牌的效果
